name: adeptus-necroneerium
description: Progressive code construction through strategic, tactical, implementation, and review layers.

interface.longDescription: Builds substantial software through progressively resolved code: Lich shapes repository structure, Vampire writes executable contracts and skeletons, Skeleton completes behavior, and Shade verifies and routes repairs.
interface.defaultPrompt: Use @adeptus-necroneerium to complete this substantial coding task.
